lines.speaker: Dr. Maya
lines.text: Hi, Zuzu. The river's chatty today. You just have to know where to listen.

lines.speaker: Dr. Maya
lines.text: Start with simple clues: clear or cloudy, warm or cool, sharp smell or clean air.

lines.speaker: Dr. Maya
lines.text: The tiny creek critters help too. Some only stay where the water is kind to them.

lines.speaker: Dr. Maya
lines.text: Stoneflies are picky in the best way. If they vanish, I start asking upstream questions.

lines.speaker: Dr. Maya
lines.text: People change rivers. The work is to notice, clean up what we can, and choose better next time.

lines.speaker: Dr. Maya
lines.text: If you like outdoor questions, keep going. Biology starts with caring enough to look twice.

lines.speaker: Dr. Maya
lines.text: Want to test with me? Careful scoop, pH strip, tray check. Then you tell me what the river said.

dialogue_tree.text: Hi, Zuzu. The river's chatty today. You just have to know where to listen.
Start with simple clues: clear or cloudy, warm or cool, sharp smell or clean air.
The tiny creek critters help too. Some only stay where the water is kind to them.
Stoneflies are picky in the best way. If they vanish, I start asking upstream questions.
People change rivers. The work is to notice, clean up what we can, and choose better next time.
If you like outdoor questions, keep going. Biology starts with caring enough to look twice.
Want to test with me? Careful scoop, pH strip, tray check. Then you tell me what the river said.
